jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Aptech
jsonLd.description:
Aptech, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Ludhiana operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Aptech:
Aptech is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech!
